summary: Iteration 8 testing complete: All Despesas features verified working. Backend accepts data_vencimento field. Frontend shows Pendentes/Finalizadas tabs with counts, 'Data de Vencimento' label with 'Sem vencimento' toggle for despesas, 'Data' label for receitas, Finalizar modal for recurring despesas, and check mark button for non-recurring despesas.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy
Backend: Transaction model accepts data_vencimento field
Backend: POST /api/transactions creates transaction with data_vencimento
Backend: POST /api/transactions creates transaction without data_vencimento (null)
Backend: GET /api/transactions returns transactions with data_vencimento field
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id} can update data_vencimento
Backend: PATCH /api/transactions/{id}/toggle-paid toggles pago status
Backend: Create recurring despesa works
Backend: Update recurring despesa to paid and non-recurring works
Frontend: Despesas page shows 'Pendentes' and 'Finalizadas' tabs (data-testid='despesas-tabs')
Frontend: Pendentes tab shows only unpaid expenses with count
Frontend: Finalizadas tab shows only paid expenses with count
Frontend: TransactionModal for despesa shows 'Data de Vencimento' label
Frontend: TransactionModal for despesa has 'Sem vencimento' toggle
Frontend: When 'Sem vencimento' is toggled ON, date picker is hidden and shows registration date text
Frontend: When 'Sem vencimento' is toggled OFF, date picker for vencimento is shown
Frontend: TransactionModal for receita shows 'Data' label (not 'Data de Vencimento')
Frontend: TransactionModal for receita does NOT show 'Sem vencimento' toggle
Frontend: Receita defaults to pago=true, Despesa defaults to pago=false
Frontend: Recurring unpaid despesas show 'Finalizar' button (CheckCircle icon)
Frontend: Clicking 'Finalizar' opens modal with installment quantity selector (data-testid='finalizar-qtd')
Frontend: Finalizar modal shows total to pay based on quantity selected
Frontend: Finalizar modal has Finalizar button (data-testid='finalizar-btn')
Frontend: Desktop table header for despesas shows 'Vencimento' instead of 'Data'
Frontend: Non-paid non-recurring despesas show check mark button to mark as paid
Frontend: Marking despesa as paid moves it from Pendentes to Finalizadas tab
Frontend: 'Sem vencimento' badge shown for despesas without vencimento date
Frontend: 'Recorrente' badge shown for recurring despesas
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented: despesas-tabs, tx-modal-vencimento, finalizar-qtd, finalizar-btn
TransactionModal correctly differentiates between despesa (Data de Vencimento + Sem vencimento toggle) and receita (Data only)
Tabs correctly filter by pago status: Pendentes (pago=false), Finalizadas (pago=true)
Finalizar functionality creates N-1 paid copies and marks original as paid+non-recurring
Column header correctly shows 'Vencimento' for despesas and 'Data' for receitas
test_credentials: Created temporary test user (test-user-despesas-*) for testing - cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test user with session, categories, and transactions for testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified all Despesas features: (1) Backend accepts data_vencimento field in Transaction model; (2) Frontend Despesas page has Pendentes/Finalizadas tabs with counts; (3) TransactionModal for despesa shows 'Data de Vencimento' with 'Sem vencimento' toggle; (4) TransactionModal for receita shows 'Data' only; (5) Recurring unpaid despesas show Finalizar button that opens modal with quantity selector; (6) Non-recurring unpaid despesas show check mark button to mark as paid; (7) Desktop table header shows 'Vencimento' for despesas. All tests passed.

data_vencimento_field.backend: VERIFIED - Transaction model accepts data_vencimento (optional string)
data_vencimento_field.frontend_despesa: VERIFIED - Shows 'Data de Vencimento' label with 'Sem vencimento' toggle

sem_vencimento_toggle.toggle_off: VERIFIED - Date picker visible for vencimento date
sem_vencimento_toggle.toggle_on: VERIFIED - Date picker hidden, shows 'Sem vencimento (registro: DD/MM/YYYY)'

finalizar_recurring.button: VERIFIED - CheckCircle icon button for recurring unpaid despesas
finalizar_recurring.total_display: VERIFIED - Shows 'Total a pagar' based on quantity

mark_as_paid.button: VERIFIED - Check mark button for non-recurring unpaid despesas
mark_as_paid.functionality: VERIFIED - Moves despesa from Pendentes to Finalizadas
